---
title: "Ink Autodraw Test"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - ink
---

## Draw target

Pen wave, highlighter swipe, arrow, rectangle and ellipse below,
with the full toolbar and options panel open.

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  setTimeout(function () {
    var api = window.InkAnnotate._api;
    api.setDrawMode(true);
    var canvas = document.getElementById("ink-canvas");
    function ev(type, x, y) {
      canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent(type, {
        clientX: x, clientY: y, pointerId: 1, pointerType: "mouse",
        buttons: 1, bubbles: true, pressure: 0.5
      }));
    }
    function ev2(type, x, y, pressure) {
      canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent(type, {
        clientX: x, clientY: y, pointerId: 1, pointerType: "pen",
        buttons: 1, bubbles: true, pressure: pressure
      }));
    }
    function stroke(x0, y0, x1, y1, wavy) {
      ev2("pointerdown", x0, y0, 0.2);
      for (var i = 1; i <= 30; i++) {
        var t = i / 30;
        ev2("pointermove",
           x0 + (x1 - x0) * t,
           y0 + (y1 - y0) * t + (wavy ? Math.sin(t * Math.PI * 2) * 15 : 0),
           0.2 + 0.8 * Math.sin(t * Math.PI));
      }
      ev2("pointerup", x1, y1, 0.1);
    }
    api.setTool("pen");
    api.setColor("#ef4444");
    stroke(180, 260, 560, 275, true);
    api.setTool("highlighter");
    api.setColor("#eab308");
    stroke(180, 350, 560, 350, false);
    api.setShape("arrow");
    api.setColor("#0ea5e9");
    stroke(620, 420, 800, 300, false);
    api.setShape("rect");
    api.setColor("#22c55e");
    stroke(180, 430, 400, 540, false);
    api.setShape("ellipse");
    api.setColor("#6366f1");
    stroke(450, 430, 620, 540, false);
    api.setTool("pen");
    api.setShape("rect");
    api.openBloom();
  }, 1500);
});
</script>
```
